description: The Memory API for the AI era

env_var_specs.name: SUPERMEMORY_ADMIN_PROJECT
env_var_specs.description: Optional Supermemory project id; sent as the x-sm-project header to scope all operations.

tools.name: connection_resources_get-v3-connections-by-connection-id-resources
tools.description: Fetch resources for a connection (supported providers: GitHub for now). Required: connectionId. Optional: page (default: 1), parent_id, per_page (default: 30). Returns array of ConnectionResourcesGetV3ConnectionsByConnectionIdResourcesItem.

params.name: connectionId
params.description: Connection id

params.name: page
params.description: Page

params.name: parent_id
params.description: Parent id

params.name: per_page
params.description: Per page

tools.name: connections_delete-v3-by-id
tools.description: Delete a specific connection by ID. Required: connectionId. Optional: deleteDocuments (default: true). Returns the ConnectionsDeleteV3ByIdResponse. Destructive.

params.name: connectionId
params.description: Connection id

params.name: deleteDocuments
params.description: Whether to also delete documents imported by this connection. Defaults to true.

tools.name: connections_delete-v3-by-provider
tools.description: Delete connection for a specific provider and container tags. Required: provider (default: notion), containerTags. Returns the ConnectionsDeleteV3ByProviderResponse. Destructive.

params.name: provider
params.description: Provider

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Optional comma-separated list of container tags to filter connections by

tools.name: connections_get-v3-by-id
tools.description: Get connection details with id. Required: connectionId. Returns array of string.

params.name: connectionId
params.description: Connection id

tools.name: connections_post-v3-by-provider
tools.description: Initialize connection and get authorization URL. Required: provider (default: notion). Optional: containerTag, containerTags, documentLimit (plus 2 more). Returns the new ConnectionsPostV3ByProviderResponse.

params.name: provider
params.description: Provider

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Container tag

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Container tags

params.name: documentLimit
params.description: Document limit

params.name: metadata
params.description: Metadata

params.name: redirectUrl
params.description: Redirect url

tools.name: connections_post-v3-list
tools.description: List all connections. Optional: containerTags. Returns array of ConnectionsPostV3ListItem.

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Optional comma-separated list of container tags to filter documents by

tools.name: connections_configure_post-v3-connections-by-connection-id
tools.description: Configure resources for a connection (supported providers: GitHub for now). Required: connectionId, resources. Returns the new ConfigurePostV3ConnectionsByConnectionIdResponse.

params.name: connectionId
params.description: Connection id

params.name: resources
params.description: Resources

tools.name: connections_connection_post-v3-by-provider
tools.description: Get connection details with provider and container tags. Required: provider (default: notion), containerTags. Returns array of string.

params.name: provider
params.description: Provider

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Comma-separated list of container tags to filter connection by

tools.name: connections_documents_post-v3-connections-by-provider
tools.description: List documents indexed for a provider and container tags. Required: provider (default: notion). Optional: containerTags. Returns array of DocumentsPostV3ConnectionsByProviderItem.

params.name: provider
params.description: Provider

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Optional comma-separated list of container tags to filter documents by

tools.name: connections_import_post-v3-connections-by-provider
tools.description: Initiate a manual sync of connections. Required: provider (default: notion). Optional: containerTags.

params.name: provider
params.description: Provider

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Optional comma-separated list of container tags to filter connections by

tools.name: container-tags_delete-v3-by
tools.description: Delete a container tag and all its documents and memories. Only organization owners and admins can perform this action. Required: containerTag. Returns the ContainerTagsDeleteV3ByResponse. Destructive.

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Container tag

tools.name: container-tags_get-v3-by
tools.description: Get settings for a container tag. Required: containerTag. Returns the ContainerTagsGetV3ByResponse.

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Container tag

tools.name: container-tags_patch-v3-by
tools.description: Update settings for a container tag. Required: containerTag. Optional: entityContext, memoryFilesystemPaths, name. Returns the updated ContainerTagsPatchV3ByResponse.

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Container tag

params.name: entityContext
params.description: Custom context prompt for this container tag. Used to provide additional context when processing documents in this container. Maximum 1500 characters.

params.name: memoryFilesystemPaths
params.description: Per-tag allowlist of filesystem paths that trigger memory generation for mount-ingested documents. Docs whose filepath does not match are ingested as 'superrag' (chunked and searchable, no memory extraction).

params.name: name
params.description: Display name for this container tag. This does not change the container tag identifier.

tools.name: container-tags_post-v3-merge
tools.description: Merge multiple container tags into a target tag. All documents from the source tags will be updated to reference the target tag, and the source tags will be deleted after successful merge. Required: containerTags, targetContainerTag. Returns array of string.

params.name: containerTags
params.description: List of container tags to merge (min: 2, max: 2). All documents from these tags will be merged into the target.

params.name: targetContainerTag
params.description: Target container tag

tools.name: conversations_post-v4
tools.description: Ingest or update a conversation. Required: conversationId, messages. Optional: containerTags, metadata.

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Container tags

params.name: conversationId
params.description: Conversation id

params.name: messages
params.description: Messages

params.name: metadata
params.description: Metadata

tools.name: documents_delete-v3-bulk
tools.description: Bulk delete documents by IDs or container tags. Optional: containerTags, filepath, ids. Returns the DocumentsDeleteV3BulkResponse. Destructive.

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Array of container tags - all documents in these containers will be deleted

params.name: filepath
params.description: Delete documents matching this filepath. Exact match for full paths, prefix match if ending with /

params.name: ids
params.description: Array of document IDs to delete (max 100 at once)

tools.name: documents_delete-v3-by-id
tools.description: Delete a document by ID or customId. Required: id. Destructive.

params.name: id
params.description: Id

tools.name: documents_get-v3-by-id
tools.description: Get a document by ID. Required: id. Returns array of string.

params.name: id
params.description: Id

tools.name: documents_get-v3-processing
tools.description: Get documents that are currently being processed. Returns array of DocumentsGetV3ProcessingItem.

tools.name: documents_patch-v3-by-id
tools.description: Update a document with any content type (text, url, file, etc.) and metadata. Required: id. Optional: containerTag, containerTags, content (plus 5 more). Returns the updated DocumentsPatchV3ByIdResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Id

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Optional tag this document should be containerized by. This can be an ID for your user, a project ID, or any other identifier you wish to use to group documents.

params.name: containerTags
params.description: (DEPRECATED: Use containerTag instead) Optional tags this document should be containerized by. This can be an ID for your user, a project ID, or any other identifier you wish to use to group documents.

params.name: content
params.description: The content to extract and process into a document. This can be a URL to a website, a PDF, an image, or a video. Plaintext: Any plaintext format URL: A URL to a website, PDF, image, or video We automatically detect the content type from the url's response format.

params.name: customId
params.description: Optional custom ID of the document. This could be an ID from your database that will uniquely identify this document.

params.name: filepath
params.description: Optional file path for the document (e.g., '/documents/reports/file.pdf'). Used by supermemoryfs to map documents to filesystem paths.

params.name: filterByMetadata
params.description: Optional metadata filter scoping which existing memories are pulled as context during ingestion. Scalar values match exactly (AND across keys); array values match ANY (OR within key). Only memories whose source documents match this filter are used as context.

params.name: metadata
params.description: Optional metadata for the document. This is used to store additional information about the document. You can use this to store any additional information you need about the document. Metadata can be filtered through. Keys must be strings and are case sensitive. Values can be strings, numbers, or booleans. You cannot nest objects.

params.name: taskType
params.description: Task type: 'memory' (default) for full context layer with SuperRAG built in, 'superrag' for...

tools.name: documents_post-v3
tools.description: Add a document with any content type (text, url, file, etc.) and metadata. Required: content. Optional: containerTag, containerTags, customId (plus 6 more). Returns the new DocumentsPostV3Response.

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Optional tag this document should be containerized by. Max 100 characters, alphanumeric with hyphens, underscores, and dots only.

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Container tags

params.name: content
params.description: The content to extract and process into a document. This can be a URL to a website, a PDF, an image, or a video.

params.name: customId
params.description: Optional custom ID of the document. Max 100 characters, alphanumeric with hyphens, underscores, and dots only.

params.name: dreaming
params.description: Processing mode. 'dynamic' (default) groups related documents together so memories form from...

params.name: entityContext
params.description: Optional entity context for this container tag.

params.name: filepath
params.description: Optional file path for the document. Used by supermemoryfs to store the full path of the file.

params.name: filterByMetadata
params.description: Optional metadata filter to apply when pulling related memories and profile during ingestion. Only memories matching these filters will be used as context.

params.name: metadata
params.description: Optional metadata for the document.

params.name: taskType
params.description: Task type: 'memory' (default) for full context layer with SuperRAG built in, 'superrag' for...

tools.name: documents_post-v3-batch
tools.description: Add multiple documents in a single request. Each document can have any content type (text, url, file, etc.) and metadata. Required: documents. Optional: containerTag, containerTags, content (plus 6 more). Returns array of DocumentsPostV3BatchItem.

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Optional tag this document should be containerized by. This can be an ID for your user, a project ID, or any other identifier you wish to use to group documents.

params.name: containerTags
params.description: (DEPRECATED: Use containerTag instead) Optional tags this document should be containerized by. This can be an ID for your user, a project ID, or any other identifier you wish to use to group documents.

params.name: content
params.description: Content

params.name: documents
params.description: Documents

params.name: dreaming
params.description: Processing mode. 'dynamic' (default) groups related documents together so memories form from...

params.name: entityContext
params.description: Optional entity context for this container tag.

params.name: filepath
params.description: Optional file path for the document (e.g., '/documents/reports/file.pdf'). Used by supermemoryfs to map documents to filesystem paths.

params.name: filterByMetadata
params.description: Optional metadata filter scoping which existing memories are pulled as context during ingestion. Scalar values match exactly (AND across keys); array values match ANY (OR within key). Only memories whose source documents match this filter are used as context.

params.name: metadata
params.description: Optional metadata for the document. This is used to store additional information about the document. You can use this to store any additional information you need about the document. Metadata can be filtered through. Keys must be strings and are case sensitive. Values can be strings, numbers, or booleans. You cannot nest objects.

params.name: taskType
params.description: Task type: 'memory' (default) for full context layer with SuperRAG built in, 'superrag' for...

tools.name: documents_post-v3-file
tools.description: Upload a file to be processed. Required: file. Optional: containerTag, containerTags, customId (plus 9 more). Returns the new DocumentsPostV3FileResponse.

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Optional container tag (e.g., 'user_123'). Use this for a single tag.

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Optional container tags. Can be either a JSON string of an array (e.g., '['user_123', 'project_123']') or a single string (e.g., 'user_123'). Single strings will be automatically converted to an array.

params.name: customId
params.description: Optional custom ID of the document. Max 100 characters, alphanumeric with hyphens, underscores, and colons only.

params.name: dreaming
params.description: Processing mode. 'dynamic' (default) groups related documents together so memories form from...

params.name: entityContext
params.description: Optional entity context for this container tag.

params.name: file
params.description: File to upload and process

params.name: fileType
params.description: Optional file type override to force specific processing behavior. Valid values: text, pdf, tweet, google_doc, google_slide, google_sheet, image, video, notion_doc, webpage, onedrive

params.name: filepath
params.description: Optional file path for the uploaded file (e.g., '/documents/reports/file.pdf'). Used by supermemoryfs to map documents to filesystem paths.

params.name: filterByMetadata
params.description: Optional metadata filter as a JSON string. Scopes which existing memories are pulled as context during ingestion. Scalar values match exactly (AND across keys); array values match ANY (OR within key).

params.name: metadata
params.description: Optional metadata for the document as a JSON string. This is used to store additional information about the document. Keys must be strings and values can be strings, numbers, or booleans.

params.name: mimeType
params.description: Required when fileType is 'image' or 'video'. Specifies the exact MIME type to use (e.g., 'image/png', 'image/jpeg', 'video/mp4', 'video/webm')

params.name: taskType
params.description: Task type: 'memory' (default) for full context layer with SuperRAG built in, 'superrag' for...

params.name: useAdvancedProcessing
params.description: DEPRECATED: This field is no longer used. Advanced PDF processing is now automatic with our hybrid Mistral OCR + Gemini pipeline. This parameter will be accepted but ignored for backwards compatibility.

tools.name: documents_post-v3-list
tools.description: Retrieves a paginated list of documents with their metadata and workflow status. Optional: containerTags, filepath, filters (plus 5 more). Returns array of DocumentsPostV3ListItem.

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Optional tags this document should be containerized by. This can be an ID for your user, a project ID, or any other identifier you wish to use to group documents.

params.name: filepath
params.description: Filter documents by filepath. Exact match for full paths, prefix match if ending with /

params.name: filters
params.description: Optional filters to apply to the search. Can be a JSON string or Query object.

params.name: includeContent
params.description: Whether to include the content field in the response. Warning: This can make responses significantly larger.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of items per page

params.name: order
params.description: Sort order

params.name: page
params.description: Page number to fetch

params.name: sort
params.description: Field to sort by

tools.name: documents_post-v3-search
tools.description: Search memories with advanced filtering. Required: q. Optional: categoriesFilter, chunkThreshold (default: 0), containerTag (plus 11 more). Returns array of DocumentsPostV3SearchItem.

params.name: categoriesFilter
params.description: DEPRECATED: Optional category filters

params.name: chunkThreshold
params.description: Threshold / sensitivity for chunk selection. 0 is least sensitive (returns most chunks, more results), 1 is most sensitive (returns lesser chunks, accurate results)

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Optional single container tag. Use this or containerTags.

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Optional tags this search should be containerized by. This can be an ID for your user, a project ID, or any other identifier you wish to use to filter documents.

params.name: docId
params.description: Optional document ID to search within. You can use this to find chunks in a very large document.

params.name: documentThreshold
params.description: DEPRECATED: This field is no longer used in v3 search. The search now uses chunkThreshold only. This parameter will be ignored.

params.name: filepath
params.description: Filter search results by filepath. Exact match for full paths, prefix match if ending with /

params.name: filters
params.description: Optional filters to apply to the search. Can be a JSON string or Query object.

params.name: includeFullDocs
params.description: If true, include full document in the response. This is helpful if you want a chatbot to know the full context of the document.

params.name: includeSummary
params.description: If true, include document summary in the response. This is helpful if you want a chatbot to know the full context of the document.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: onlyMatchingChunks
params.description: If true, only return matching chunks without context. Normally, we send the previous and next chunk to provide more context for LLMs. If you only want the matching chunk, set this to true.

params.name: q
params.description: Search query string

params.name: rerank
params.description: If true, rerank the results based on the query. This is helpful if you want to ensure the most relevant results are returned.

params.name: rewriteQuery
params.description: If true, rewrites the query to make it easier to find documents. This increases the latency by about 400ms

tools.name: documents_chunks_get-v3-documents-by-id
tools.description: Get all chunks for a document, ordered by position. Required: id. Returns array of ChunksGetV3DocumentsByIdItem.

params.name: id
params.description: Id

tools.name: documents_file-url_get-v3-documents-by-id
tools.description: Get a fresh presigned URL for a document's file. Returns a time-limited URL (24h) that can be used to download the file. Required: id.

params.name: id
params.description: Id

tools.name: memories_delete-v4
tools.description: Forget (soft delete) a memory entry. The memory is marked as forgotten but not permanently deleted. Required: containerTag. Optional: content, id, reason. Returns the MemoriesDeleteV4Response. Destructive.

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Container tag / space identifier. Required to scope the operation.

params.name: content
params.description: Exact content match of the memory entry to operate on. Use this when you don't have the ID.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of the memory entry to operate on

params.name: reason
params.description: Optional reason for forgetting this memory

tools.name: memories_patch-v4
tools.description: Update a memory by creating a new version. The original memory is preserved with isLatest=false. Required: containerTag, newContent. Optional: content, forgetAfter, forgetReason (plus 3 more). Returns the updated MemoriesPatchV4Response.

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Container tag / space identifier. Required to scope the operation.

params.name: content
params.description: Exact content match of the memory entry to operate on. Use this when you don't have the ID.

params.name: forgetAfter
params.description: ISO 8601 datetime string. The memory will be auto-forgotten after this time. Pass null to clear an existing expiry. Omit to inherit from the previous version.

params.name: forgetReason
params.description: Optional reason for the scheduled forgetting. Cleared automatically when forgetAfter is set to null.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of the memory entry to operate on

params.name: metadata
params.description: Optional metadata. If not provided, inherits from the previous version.

params.name: newContent
params.description: The new content that will replace the existing memory

params.name: temporal-context-document-date
params.description: Date the document was authored

params.name: temporal-context-event-date
params.description: Dates of events referenced in the memory

tools.name: memories_post-v4
tools.description: Create memories directly, bypassing the document ingestion workflow. Generates embeddings and makes them immediately searchable. Required: containerTag, memories. Returns array of MemoriesPostV4Item.

params.name: containerTag
params.description: The space / container tag these memories belong to.

params.name: memories
params.description: Array of memories to create

tools.name: memories_post-v4-list
tools.description: List all latest memory entries from specified container tags with their update history and source documents. Required: containerTags. Optional: filters, limit, order (default: desc) (plus 2 more). Returns array of MemoriesPostV4ListItem.

params.name: containerTags
params.description: Container tags to filter memory entries. At least one tag is required.

params.name: filters
params.description: Optional filters to apply to the search. Can be a JSON string or Query object.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of items per page

params.name: order
params.description: Sort order

params.name: page
params.description: Page number to fetch

params.name: sort
params.description: Field to sort by

tools.name: profiles_post-v4
tools.description: Get user profile with optional search results. Required: containerTag. Optional: filters, q, threshold. Returns the new ProfilesPostV4Response.

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Tag to filter the profile by. This can be an ID for your user, a project ID, or any other identifier you wish to use to filter memories.

params.name: filters
params.description: Optional metadata filters to apply to profile results and search results. Supports complex AND/OR queries with multiple conditions.

params.name: q
params.description: Optional search query to include search results in the response

params.name: threshold
params.description: Threshold for search results. Only results with a score above this threshold will be included.

tools.name: settings_get-v3
tools.description: Get settings for an organization. Returns the SettingsGetV3Response.

tools.name: settings_patch-v3
tools.description: Update settings for an organization. Optional: chunkSize, excludeItems, filterPrompt (plus 14 more). Returns the updated SettingsPatchV3Response.

params.name: chunkSize
params.description: Chunk size

params.name: excludeItems
params.description: Exclude items

params.name: filterPrompt
params.description: Filter prompt

params.name: githubClientId
params.description: Github client id

params.name: githubClientSecret
params.description: Github client secret

params.name: githubCustomKeyEnabled
params.description: Github custom key enabled

params.name: googleDriveClientId
params.description: Google drive client id

params.name: googleDriveClientSecret
params.description: Google drive client secret

params.name: googleDriveCustomKeyEnabled
params.description: Google drive custom key enabled

params.name: includeItems
params.description: Include items

params.name: notionClientId
params.description: Notion client id

params.name: notionClientSecret
params.description: Notion client secret

params.name: notionCustomKeyEnabled
params.description: Notion custom key enabled

params.name: onedriveClientId
params.description: Onedrive client id

params.name: onedriveClientSecret
params.description: Onedrive client secret

params.name: onedriveCustomKeyEnabled
params.description: Onedrive custom key enabled

params.name: shouldLLMFilter
params.description: Should llmfilter

tools.name: settings_post-v3-reset
tools.description: Reset organization content: removes documents, memories, spaces (except default project), connections, and org settings. Preserves the org, members, and billing. Required: confirmation. Returns the new SettingsPostV3ResetResponse.

params.name: confirmation
params.description: Confirmation

tools.name: supermemory_recall_post-v4-search
tools.description: Search memory entries - Low latency for conversational. Required: q. Optional: aggregate (default: false), containerTag, filepath (plus 7 more). Returns array of SupermemoryRecallPostV4SearchItem.

params.name: aggregate
params.description: If true, aggregates information from multiple memories to create new synthesized memories. The result will be a mix of aggregated and non-aggregated memories, reranked by relevance to the query. Works in conjunction with reranking.

params.name: containerTag
params.description: Optional tag this search should be containerized by. This can be an ID for your user, a project ID, or any other identifier you wish to use to filter memories.

params.name: filepath
params.description: Filter search results by filepath. Exact match for full paths, prefix match if ending with /

params.name: filters
params.description: Optional filters to apply to the search. Can be a JSON string or Query object.

params.name: include-chunks
params.description: DEPRECATED: Use searchMode='hybrid' instead. If true, automatically switches to hybrid mode. This field is kept for backward compatibility only.

params.name: include-documents
params.description: Documents

params.name: include-forgotten-memories
params.description: If true, include forgotten memories in search results. Forgotten memories are memories that have been explicitly forgotten or have passed their expiration date.

params.name: include-related-memories
params.description: Related memories

params.name: include-summaries
params.description: Summaries

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: q
params.description: Search query string

params.name: rerank
params.description: If true, rerank the results based on the query. This is helpful if you want to ensure the most relevant results are returned.

params.name: rewriteQuery
params.description: If true, rewrites the query to make it easier to find documents. This increases the latency by about 400ms

params.name: searchMode
params.description: Search mode. 'memories' searches only memory entries (default). 'hybrid' searches both memories and document chunks. 'documents' searches only document chunks.

params.name: threshold
params.description: Threshold / sensitivity for memories selection. 0 is least sensitive (returns most memories, more results), 1 is most sensitive (returns lesser memories, accurate results)
